scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let h='dev';try{h=require('child_process').execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD',{stdio:'pipe'}).toString().trim()}catch{}const t=new Date().toISOString();const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));fs.writeFileSync('src/version.js',`export const VERSION='${p.version}';export const COMMIT='${h}';export const BUILD_TIME='${t}';`);console.log(`Version: ${p.version}, Commit: ${h}`);"
scripts.deploy: npm run version && npx wrangler@latest deploy
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply zjmf-monitor --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply zjmf-monitor --remote
